# Weekly 1:1 with Dave

## Summary

Tight 15-minute check-in. Staffing plan, no blockers, status quo.

## Transcript

John: Hey Dave, quick sync today. How's the staffing plan coming?

Dave: Mostly there. I have the slots blocked out, just need final
approval on the contractor budget. I'll send you the deck by Friday.

John: Cool. Anything else?

Dave: One thing — the Anthony rotation conversation. I'd like to circle
back next week.

John: Sounds good. Talk to Lindsay about the timeline first?

Dave: Will do. Talk soon.
